title: EqualizerEffect
description: Three-band equalizer (low shelf / peaking mid / high shelf) built from a series chain of `BiquadFilterNode` instances. Gain values are in dB and clamped to ±40 dB. All six parameters (gains + frequencies) are adjustable at runtime via the corresponding setters; gain changes use a short exponential ramp to avoid clicks.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Three-band equalizer (low shelf / peaking mid / high shelf) built from a series chain of `BiquadFilterNode` instances. Gain values are in dB and clamped to ±40 dB. All six parameters (gains + frequencies) are adjustable at runtime via the corresponding setters; gain changes use a short exponential ramp to avoid clicks.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Disconnects all audio nodes and releases resources. Must be called when the effect is no longer needed.

members.name: high
members.description: High-shelf gain in dB applied above highFrequency. Range −40..40, default 0.

members.name: highFrequency
members.description: Cutoff frequency in Hz of the high-shelf band. Default 6000.

members.name: inputNode
members.description: The node where audio enters this effect.

members.name: low
members.description: Low-shelf gain in dB applied below lowFrequency. Range −40..40, default 0.

members.name: lowFrequency
members.description: Cutoff frequency in Hz of the low-shelf band. Default 250.

members.name: mid
members.description: Peaking mid-band gain in dB centered at midFrequency. Range −40..40, default 0.

members.name: midFrequency
members.description: Center frequency in Hz of the peaking mid band. Default 1500.

members.name: outputNode
members.description: The node where audio exits this effect.

members.name: ready
members.description: Resolves when the effect is fully initialized. Defaults to immediately-resolved for sync effects.
